name: climbing-analytics-discovery
description: "Use when framing an OpenCrux climbing analytics slice, deciding what footage is supported, defining explainable metrics, or narrowing scope for climbing video product work."
---
# Climbing Analytics Discovery

Use this skill when OpenCrux work starts drifting beyond the validated first slice.

## When To Use

- A new climbing mode is being proposed.
- A metric is being added and its meaning may be ambiguous.
- The team needs to separate useful analysis from speculative ML.
- Supported capture conditions need to be tightened or expanded.

## Checklist

- Identify the exact climber workflow.
- State the supported camera and footage assumptions.
- Prefer metrics that can be linked back to timestamps or visible motion.
- Call out what the system cannot infer reliably.
- Keep route, training, and social scope separate unless the user value depends on combining them.

## Output

- Proposed user workflow
- Supported footage constraints
- Metric candidates
- Reliability limits
- Recommendation
